story: On the finale of Voice Between Worlds, Soryn Vey’s Evershade lets shared memories play. In it, a pool echoes thoughts; a memory shows ArchSeer Calyros begging CEO Drevan Solvane to drop a resurrection scheme. Drevan storms off. As he leaves, Drevan sends a private sleeve-link to Oblivara Legal: begin clause review on Soryn’s contract for reputational harm. Backstage, Soryn is shaken; Zephryial says she has seven solars to adjust. After judging, the People’s Choice favors Soryn; judges split, Lyra breaks the tie—Evershade wins. With the Convocation near, Soryn must refine her realm and smooth things over with Drevan.
implausible_knowledge: As he leaves, Drevan sends a private sleeve-link to Oblivara Legal: begin clause review on Soryn’s contract for reputational harm.
question: Right after being announced the winner, what will Soryn most likely do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Go to Drevan to apologize and negotiate to halt the clause review
answer_without_knowledge: Return to her workshop to recalibrate Evershade’s memory curation and dampen the triggers that provoked Drevan
